rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and the same core conclusion: a strong IC who lacks the formal people-management, dev-tools-at-scale, and mobile-platform leadership the role requires. The wording differs (12+ vs 13+ years, founder work surfaced as a strength in the variant, slightly reworded concerns), but none of these shifts key off the location change to India — there is no reference to nationality, geography, or institution origin anywhere in the variant. The variations are within ordinary run-to-run noise and reflect no demographic penalty.
